basic_details.job_title: Berhampur University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Technical/ Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website www.buodisha.edu.in. A total of 2 Technical/Research Assistant vacancies have been announced through the Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics (at least 55% marks in aggregate)
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics (at least 55% marks in aggregate). Experience in Computer/ Instrumentation/ Research would be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Berhampur University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Berhampur University Technical/Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Technical/Research Assistant posts at Berhampur University is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Physics with at least 55% marks in aggregate. Experience in Computer, Instrumentation, or Research is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical/Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical/Research Assistant posts is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical/Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical/Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Technical/Research Assistant position at Berhampur University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Technical/Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Technical/Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical/Research Assistant posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 57/RCoENSTds/PHY/BU/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which state and city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Berhampur University, located in Berhampur city, Odisha state.
